LanguageData.SolarWeb_Stratum_PollenCoating_Descripti: A thick wave of seasonal pollen has coated all of the skylights in the {0}, leaving a sticky yellow film that blocks light. They must be cleaned to restore full light transmission.
LanguageData.SolarWeb_Stratum_DustCoating_Description: Strong atmospheric winds have deposited a heavy layer of dust over the skylights in the {0}, blocking light. They must be cleaned to restore full light transmission.
